uplink.description: Weather Station full uplink (battery, temperature, humidity, wind direction, pressure, wind speed) - upstream TTN example input
uplink._note: Input is the upstream TTN codec example; expected.data authored here by running reference/upstream-codec.js (oracle: battery 100, temperature 27.2, humidity 56.5, wind_direction 25.6, pressure 1015.4, wind_speed 40.2) and mapping to normalized keys (battery%->batteryPercent extra; temperature/humidity/pressure->air.*; wind_direction/wind_speed->wind.*). Pressure is atmospheric hPa, in the 900-1100 bound.

uplink.description: Weather Station uplink including cumulative rainfall + frame counter
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected.data authored by running reference/upstream-codec.js (oracle: battery 85, temperature 22.5, humidity 60, wind_direction 180, pressure 1013.2, wind_speed 3.5, rainfall_total 12.34, rainfall_counter 7) and mapping to normalized keys. rainfall_total->rain.cumulative (mm); rainfall_counter->rainfallCounter extra. Pressure 1013.2 hPa is atmospheric, in the 900-1100 bound.
Synthetic input with a channel/type pair the decoder does not handle; first iteration breaks before recognizing anything.
Synthetic empty input guards the no-data case.
